description: Auto-generate and insert alt and aria-label attributes with Gemini API. Context-aware, and leaves decorative images empty (HTML/PHP/JSX/TSX, static paths).
command.generateAlt: Auto ALT Writer: Generate ALT for images
command.generateVideoAriaLabel: Auto ALT Writer: Generate ARIA-LABEL or transcript for videos
command.setApiKey: Auto ALT Writer: Set your Gemini API key (use your own quota)
command.clearApiKey: Auto ALT Writer: Remove your Gemini API key (use shared free tier)
config.altGenerationMode.description: [Image] Set what to prioritize when generating ALT text.
config.altGenerationMode.markdownDescrip: [Image] Set what to prioritize when generating ALT text.
config.altGenerationMode.enum.seo: SEO: Generate ALT text focused on search engine optimization (SEO)
config.altGenerationMode.enum.a11y: A11Y: Generate ALT text focused on accessibility (A11Y) improvement
config.decorativeKeywords.description: [Image] If the filename contains these keywords, the image is treated as decorative and its ALT is set to empty.
config.decorativeKeywords.markdownDescri: [Image] If the filename contains these keywords, it will be identified as decorative and the ALT will be set to empty (`alt=""`).
config.videoDescriptionMode.description: [Video] Set the detail level of the generated text.
config.videoDescriptionMode.markdownDesc: [Video] Set the detail level of generated text. Use transcript mode for creating text manuscripts for audio descriptions, etc.
config.videoDescriptionMode.enum.summary: Summary: A concise label to identify what the video is before playing it
config.videoDescriptionMode.enum.transcr: Transcript: A complete transcription including visual information to fully understand the video content
config.outputLanguage.description: [Common] Set the language of the generated text.
config.outputLanguage.markdownDescriptio: [Common] Set the language of the generated text.
config.insertionMode.description: [Common] Set how the generated text is inserted.
config.insertionMode.markdownDescription: [Common] Set how the generated text is inserted.
config.insertionMode.enum.confirm: Manual: Review generated text content before manual insertion
config.contextAnalysisEnabled.descriptio: [Common] Analyze surrounding text to prevent redundant descriptions for screen readers.
config.contextAnalysisEnabled.markdownDe: [Common] Analyze surrounding text of images and videos. If already described by surrounding text, automatically sets `alt=""` to prevent duplicate descriptions for screen readers.
config.customFilePath.description: [Advanced] Path to a Markdown file for customizing Gemini prompts and the API model (relative to the workspace root).
config.customFilePath.markdownDescriptio:
[Advanced] Path to a Markdown file for customizing Gemini prompts and API model. Specify as a relative path from the workspace root.  

**Example:** `.vscode/custom-prompts.md`
